title: CT13 legal branch run — Tiered charging
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT13 (Tiered charging). A conforming run may use only CT13 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT13 (Tiered charging) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT13.N01 through CT13.N16; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT13 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT13 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT13 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
